title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster, addressing infrastructure gaps in their non-vertically-integrated business model. The video argues that AI competition is shifting from model benchmarks toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure.
